deletion_protection_enabled.description: Enables protection against accidental deletion; set to true to prevent instance deletion.

deletion_protection_reason.description: Reason for enabling deletion protection, to prevent accidental instance deletion; optional and should be set thoughtfully.

description.description: Provides a user-defined description for the Filestore instance; must be concise and relevant to the instance's purpose or usage.

file_shares.description: Defines the configuration for file shares, including their name, capacity, and export options.
file_shares.type: list(object({capacity_gb: number,name: string,source_backup: optional(string),nfs_export_options: list(object({access_mode: optional(string),anon_gid: optional(number),anon_uid: optional(number),ip_ranges: optional(list(string)),squash_mode: optional(string)}))}))

initial_replication.description: Defines whether the instance should replicate data from an existing source during creation; must be set to true for replication-based setups.

kms_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key to use for encrypting the Filestore instance, requiring the key to be in the same region as the instance.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the Filestore instance; must comply with GCP label format.

location.description: Specifies the GCP region where the Filestore instance will be created; must match the region of the associated network.

name.description: Unique identifier for the Filestore instance; must be between 1-63 characters, start with a lowercase letter, and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

networks.description: Defines the network configurations for the instance, including the subnet and IP range, which must belong to the same VPC and region as the Filestore instance.
networks.type: list(object({connect_mode: optional(string),ip_addresses: optional(list(string)),modes: list(string),network: string,reserved_ip_range: optional(string)}))

performance_config.description: Defines the performance tier for the Filestore instance, specifying the throughput and IOPS settings.

protocol.description: Specifies the network protocol used for the Filestore instance, such as NFSv3 or NFSv4, depending on compatibility requirements.

tags.description: List of key-value pairs to apply to the instance for organization, categorization, or filtering purposes.

tier.description: Defines the service tier for the Filestore instance, specifying performance and cost options. Valid values are BASIC_HDD, BASIC_SSD, or HIGH_SCALE_SSD.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations for the Filestore instance.

zone.description: Specifies the zone where the Filestore instance will be created; must match a valid Google Cloud zone within the selected region.
